summary: ThreeDScene: scalar triple product (v×w)·u equals det[v|w|u] equals signed volume. v=(2, 0, 0) BLUE, w=(1, 2, 0) ORANGE, u=(0.5, 0.5, 2) GREEN. YELLOW parallelepiped + PURPLE v×w arrow (perpendicular). Ambient rotation. Both triple product and determinant computed numerically and shown equal.
